chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرِّضَا بِمَوْهِبَةِ الْإِيمَانِ وَ الصَّبْرِ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ بَعْدَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 101 – The satisfaction with the gift of the Emān and the patience upon everything after it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه بالمعلى معتبر عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/292)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه بالمعلى معتبر عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/292)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَالَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى لَوْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مُؤْمِنٌ وَاحِدٌ لَاسْتَغْنَيْتُ بِهِ عَنْ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِي وَ لَجَعَلْتُ لَهُ مِنْ إِيمَانِهِ أُنْساً لَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى أَحَدٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Ibn Muskan, from Moalla Bin Khunays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘Allahazwj Blessed and High Said: “If there does not happen to be in the earth except for one Momin, Iazwj would have Sufficed with him from the entirety of Myazwj creatures, and would have Made his Emān to be a comfort for him, he would not be needy to anyone (else)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from ibn Muskan from Mu’alla ibn Khanis from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Allah, the Most Blessed, the Most High, has said, “Had there not been more than one believer on earth, he would have been sufficient for Me in place of all of My other creatures and I would have made his belief to provide him good company to help him live independent of all creatures.’”
